approved_exception_note: No non-retrieval tooling edits are approved for this handoff; packet-planner/tooling work should stay in a separate packet.
kickoff_budget_note: Within the default AGENTS.md low-risk budget: 4 completed tasks, retrieval-owned paths only, no shared or integrator-locked edits, and required local gates rerun before handoff.
roadmap_items: Milestone 3: Product Readiness -> Define generation provenance contract (retrieval evidence attached to outputs) for `feat-retrieval-fts`
scope_completed: The lane canonicalized the FTS-first retrieval MVP so generation flows receive deterministic excerpt payloads and provenance, matching PRODUCT_VISION.md capability 2, Retrieval-first context handling. PageIndex and embeddings remain deferred as fallback-only plumbing, and the handoff stays limited to the retrieval-owned feature surface.
scope_goal: Canonicalize the FTS-first retrieval MVP so generation flows receive deterministic excerpt payloads and provenance, with PageIndex and embeddings deferred as fallback-only plumbing.
tasks_completed: Canonicalized FTS excerpt lookup so excerpt rehydration returns deterministic payloads and records an audit trail.
Normalized retrieval provenance and downstream payload builders so excerpt, source, citation, doc, and context bundles share stable hashes and fingerprints.
Locked the retrieval policy to FTS-first and kept PageIndex/embeddings deferred as fallback-only plumbing.
Exposed the canonical retrieval entrypoints through the engine/package facades so the FTS-first path remains the stable default.
compatibility_note: PageIndex and embeddings remain fallback-only plumbing behind the FTS-first policy for this MVP; they are not required retrieval paths.
